mapper.select: SELECT f.user_id, f.item_id, i.title, i.artist_name, i.album_name, i.genre_code, m.cover_url, m.preview_url, f.created_at AS favorite_time FROM user_favorite_items f JOIN items i ON i.item_id = f.item_id LEFT JOIN item_media m ON m.item_id = f.item_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND i.title NOT LIKE '示例歌曲%' ORDER BY f.created_at DESC, f.item_id DESC
SELECT item_id FROM user_favorite_items WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY item_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_favorite_items (user_id, item_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{itemId}, NOW())
